latex: The ratio of girls to boys participating in intramural volleyball at Ashland Middle School is 7 to 4. There are 42 girls in the program. What is the total number of participants?
notes: }  \textbf{Answer:} We have $\text{girls}:\text{boys} = 7:4$. Multiplying both parts of the ratio by 6 gives $\text{girls}:\text{boys} = 42:24$, so there are 24 boys to go with the 42 girls. This gives a total of $42+24 = \boxed{66}$ participants. }
